# The Kenworthy Performing Arts Centre

> A historic non-profit cinema and performing arts centre on Main Street in Moscow, Idaho. Showing films, live performances, and community events since 1926.

The Kenworthy is located at 508 S Main St, Moscow, ID 83843. The theatre programs an interleaved calendar of independent and repertory films, live music, theatre, and community events, sells digital QR-coded tickets and film passes, and rents the venue to community hosts.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Upcoming films, performances, and events with trailer previews and an editorial calendar.
- [Sponsors](/sponsors): Foundations and businesses that support the Kenworthy, plus how to become an investor.
- [History](/history): A century of programming history at The Kenworthy.
- [Rental Request](/rental-request): Inquiries from community hosts who want to rent the venue.

## Optional

- [Sign In or Create Account](/auth): Account creation and sign-in for ticket buyers.
